name: Sheresh Route Warden Compacts
summary: Institutional framework for life-preserving movement, launch windows, and loss-reporting between Sheresh domes.
day_to_day: Approves crossings, assigns escorts, updates route conditions, and processes loss declarations.
who_works_there: Wardens, weather readers, crossing clerks, shelter officers, escort leaders.
who_uses_it: Travelers, relief caravans, researchers, families moving between domes.
authority: Can delay or deny travel when route conditions threaten communal survival.
public_manifestation: Departure boards, escort rosters, heated shelter queues, route advisories.
conflict_or_bottleneck: Every delay feels personal when someone desperately needs to move.
